summary: Good soundboard recording featuring a standout Shakedown Street jam and an extended Corrina improvisation.
review: The reviewers praise this show as a clear step up from the previous night, highlighting a tight Shakedown Street jam and a long, flowing jam off of Corrina. The source is a soundboard tape that listeners find listenable, though no specific audio quirks are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the show 4 stars and mentions strong jams, implying a good musical performance and acceptable soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio issues mentioned; reviewer notes this recording is noticeably better than the previous night, suggesting clear and balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Jam sections are highlighted; reviewers note strong improvisational flow especially on Shakedown Street and Corrina.
